series_metadata.series_description: Bank receipt verifying then amount deposited into a bank account.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper bank deposit records in the form of paper deposit slips for cash and check deposits and a paper Deposit Detail Report from the depository bank which records electronic deposits and identifies date and amount of deposit into Division bank account(s) until audited by Auditor of State and audit report released and any discrepancies are resolved or, if not noticed for audit or under audit, retain for two fiscal years following date issued., Paper: Shred
